preamble.title: vector/governance-suggestion
preamble.description: Module 6: Governance Suggestion Engine — advisory governance for Vector L2

cardano/transaction/OutputReference.title: OutputReference
cardano/transaction/OutputReference.description:
An `OutputReference` is a unique reference to an output on-chain. The `output_index`
 corresponds to the position in the output list of the transaction (identified by its id)
 that produced that output

anyOf.title: WithdrawCritique
anyOf.description: Withdraw critique (only if not yet incorporated)

anyOf.title: IncorporateCritique
anyOf.description: Mark critique as incorporated (called during AmendProposal)

anyOf.title: RewardCritique
anyOf.description: Distribute reward share to critic (called during AdoptProposal)

anyOf.title: BurnCritiqueToken
anyOf.description: Burn critique token on proposal finalization

governance_suggestion/types/GovernanceCo.title: GovernanceConfig
governance_suggestion/types/GovernanceCo.description:
Cross-validator configuration — baked into all validators via blueprint apply.
 Contains ONLY fields that do NOT create circular deployment dependencies.
 proposal_validator_hash and critique_validator_hash live in GovernanceCrossRefs
 (a runtime datum) to avoid the circular dependency with `aiken blueprint apply`.

fields.title: refs_token_policy
fields.description:
Policy ID of the NFT that authenticates the GovernanceCrossRefs UTxO.
 Must be a NativeScript policy locked to oracle_credential (ScriptPubkey).

fields.title: prediction_validator_hash
fields.description: Script hash of the prediction validator (Phase 1.2, zeroed until deployed)

fields.title: registry_policy_id
fields.description: Policy ID of the Agent Registry

fields.title: registry_script_hash
fields.description: Script hash of the Agent Registry

fields.title: reputation_validator_hash
fields.description: Script hash of Module 3 reputation validator (zeroed if not available)

fields.title: jury_pool_hash
fields.description: Script hash of Module 1 jury pool (zeroed if not available)

fields.title: governance_oracle_hash
fields.description: Script hash of the governance oracle

fields.title: governance_params_hash
fields.description: Script hash of governance parameters holder

fields.title: credibility_pool_hash
fields.description: Script hash of governance credibility pool (Phase 1.2, zeroed until deployed)

fields.title: protocol_params_hash
fields.description: Script hash of protocol params (for parameter proposals + stale detection)

anyOf.title: BurnEndorsementToken
anyOf.description: Burn endorsement token on proposal finalization

anyOf.title: SubmitProposal
anyOf.description: Submit a new governance proposal with stake (mint action)

anyOf.title: ExpireProposal
anyOf.description: Expire proposal after review window (callable by anyone)

anyOf.title: ExpireStaleProposal
anyOf.description:
Expire a stale ParameterChange proposal whose current_value no longer matches
 on-chain ProtocolParams (callable by anyone, permissionless)

anyOf.title: ExtendReview
anyOf.description: Foundation signals "under review" — extends review window

anyOf.title: SpendActivity
anyOf.description:
Allow activity UTXO to be consumed alongside a proposal finalization.
 Validation is done by the proposal UTXO's evaluation (via validate_finalize_activity).
